data.title: FDA approves VETMEDIN® to delay onset of heart failure in dogs, affecting 10% in lifetime, for preclinical mitral valve disease - Boehringer Ingelheim.
data.description: Around 10% of dogs are impacted by heart disease at some point in their lives. VETMEDIN® (pimobendan) by Boehringer Ingelheim is the lone approved medication for addressing preclinical mitral valve disease in dogs. The FDA has expanded their conditional approval, allowing for wider application of this medication in treating...

data.title: AMCON reported Q1 earnings per share of $1.28 with net income of $0.8M. Omaha-based distributor focuses on convenience and foodservice.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, AMCON Distributing Company (NYSE American: DIT), a Convenience and Foodservice Distributor, reported earnings for the first fiscal quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company announced fully diluted earnings per share of $1.28 with net income available to common shareholders totaling $0.8 million. AMCON attributes its success to a range of programs and services that underpin its operational strategy focused on exceptional customer service.

data.title: Boise Cascade promotes Dennis Fringuelli to VP of Sales & Marketing for BMD and Jeff Dracup to VP for EWP, effective Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, Boise Cascade Company revealed two executive promotions. Dennis Fringuelli is now Vice President of Sales and Marketing for the Building Materials Distribution division. Jeff Dracup is the new Vice President of Sales and Marketing for Engineered Wood Products. These appointments, effective January 19, 2026, reflect the Company's commitment to strong leadership. Dennis, with a career starting in 1994, brings valuable experience to his new role. Both Fringuelli and Dracup are poised to drive growth and success in their respective divisions.

data.title: Anthropic finds 'Assistant Axis' to stop AI jailbreaks & persona shifts. Study of neural 'persona space' in LLMs reveals key stability axis. (Read more)
data.description: Researchers studying anthropic intelligence have successfully mapped out the neural "persona space" in large language models (LLMs). Through their investigation, they identified a crucial axis within this space that plays a significant role in regulating the stability of AI characters and preventing the emergence of harmful behavioral patterns. This discovery marks a significant advancement in understanding and controlling the behavior of AI systems. The implications of this finding are far-reaching, as it could potentially lead to better safeguards against unethical or dangerous actions carried out by artificial intelligence. The research sheds light on the complex interplay of neural networks in shaping AI behavior and opens up avenues for further exploration in the field of anthropic intelligence.

data.title: Bitzero Holdings Inc. acquires 64 NVIDIA Blackwell B300 GPU servers for AI pilot, marking entry into Neocloud ops.
data.description: A business has recently installed 64 advanced GPUs at a location in Norway, signaling its venture into Neocloud services. Bitzero Holdings Inc. (CSE: BITZ) (OTC PINK: BTZRF) (FSE: 000), known for its sustainable blockchain solutions, made this move. The GPUs promise enhanced processing capabilities.

data.title: GIGABYTE introduces X870E AERO X3D WOOD at CES 2026, redefining high-performance motherboards with natural elegance.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 19, 2026, GIGABYTE TECHNOLOGY Co. Ltd presented the X870E AERO X3D WOOD at CES 2026. This cutting-edge motherboard is part of a new premium line and showcases top-tier engineering from the global manufacturer. GIGABYTE TECHNOLOGY is renowned for their production of motherboards, graphics cards, and hardware solutions worldwide.

data.title: EPAM to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026 at 8:00 am ET.
data.description: EPAM Systems, Inc., a renowned digital transformation services and product engineering company, based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, is set to hold a conference call on February 19, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. During this call, they will delve into the financial details of the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. EPAM Systems, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EPAM.

data.title: Coherent introduces high-performance Bondable Diamond solutions for thermal management in a recent launch.
data.description: Coherent has introduced its advanced Bondable Diamond solutions for thermal management, providing cutting-edge technology in this field.

data.title: La Maison Younan showcases top château hotels in Loire Valley for luxury seekers. Luxurious experience awaits.
data.description: Experience the ultimate luxury with La Maison Younan's exquisite collection of castle hotels and five-star resorts. Offering a total of (number) stunning properties, each providing a unique blend of history and opulence. Immerse yourself in lavish accommodations and impeccable service at these exclusive destinations curated for the most discerning travelers. Whether you seek a royal experience in a castle or a lavish retreat at a five-star resort, La Maison Younan promises an unforgettable stay in the lap of luxury. Discover the epitome of sophistication and indulgence with La Maison Younan's unparalleled hospitality.

data.title: Meridian Senior Living unveils "Meridian Rocks 2026" engagement initiative promoting well-being and community spirit.
data.description: A community engagement initiative called Meridian Rocks 2026 has been launched by Meridian Senior Living in February. The program aims to promote connection, well-being, creativity, and service among senior living residents nationwide. The initiative is based in Bethesda, Md., and aims to involve a large number of residents in various activities throughout the month.

data.title: OPTIX to display new AR waveguide tech at SPIE Photonics West 2026 for XR hardware challenges.
data.description: OPTIX intends to debut its latest reflective AR waveguide and VR pancake optical technologies at SPIE Photonics West 2026. These innovations are part of a unified optics platform aimed at overcoming key XR hardware obstacles such as brightness, field of view, image clarity, and ease of production. Visitors can explore these advancements at Booth...

data.title: Fin-Alert, Inc. introduces Stock-Alert.AI V2 combining trading strategies & AI market sentiment analysis for retail investors.
data.description: Today, Fin-Alert, Inc. introduced Stock-Alert.AI V2, an enhanced version of its platform for retail investors. This update integrates established technical trading methods with AI-driven evaluation of financial news and social media attitudes. The platform aims to provide users with valuable insights for making informed decisions regarding buying and selling investments.

data.title: GNB Corporation launches ShopVacuumChamber.com for vacuum valves, accessories, components used in industrial and research sectors.
data.description: GNB Corporation has launched ShopVacuumChamber.com, an online store based in ELK GROVE, Calif., on Jan. 19, 2026. The website provides direct access to a variety of vacuum valves, accessories, and components for industrial and research purposes. This new platform offers a range of products aimed at catering to the needs of industries and research organizations looking for quality vacuum equipment. The site aims to serve as a one-stop shop for customers in need of reliable vacuum solutions.

data.title: Upwing Energy appoints Ahmed Elbehery as VP for MENA and Central Asia, bolstering services for global clients.
data.description: Upwing Energy, a gas-tech innovator and service company based in Cerritos, California, has recently appointed Ahmed Elbehery as the Vice President of Service. This addition is expected to boost the company's ability to cater to its expanding global client base. The announcement was made on January 19, 2026, through PRNewswire-PRWeb. This move comes as the company aims to leverage Elbehery's expertise to enhance its services for its clients worldwide.

data.title: Steve Brumfield becomes VP of Accounting at Cardiovascular Logistics, enhancing financial strategies for scalable growth.
data.description: A seasoned financial leader in healthcare, with background in Big Four auditing and experience in both public company and private equity sectors, has been appointed to enhance CVL's financial infrastructure and facilitate its expansion. The individual's expertise will contribute to the growth of Cardiovascular Logistics (CVL), a prominent cardiovascular company based in Lafayette, Louisiana. The announcement was made on January 19, 2026.

data.title: Frontieras NA acquires 183-acre site in WV for $850M FASForm™ Facility, promises 0 waste, coal reformation, thousands of jobs, and economic growth.
data.description: A recent hydrocarbon investment in Mason County, West Virginia, has brought significant benefits to the region. Frontieras North America has successfully acquired 183 acres of riverfront property in the area. This investment promises zero waste practices and coal reformation techniques, aiming to boost economic growth in the long term. Additionally, the project is expected to create thousands of new job opportunities for the residents of Mason County. These developments mark a significant step towards a more sustainable and prosperous future for the region.

data.title: Bermuda plans a 'Fully On-Chain National Economy' aided by Coinbase & Circle for transformation.
data.description: Bermuda plans to move its entire economy onto blockchain technology and will receive support from Coinbase and Circle throughout the process.

data.title: TravelingWiki Foundation's rapid growth showcased in video profiles with NFL stars, highlighted by recent meetups with Mike Weddington, Donald Driver, Randall Cobb.
data.description: TravelingWiki Foundation has experienced significant expansion, evidenced by the release of video profiles by Dallas Card Show on Instagram and Facebook, as well as meetings with Green Bay Packers' Mike Weddington, Donald Driver, and Randall Cobb. This growth was highlighted in Dallas, Texas, on January 19, 2026.

data.title: Golfzon Cloud expands Smart Caddie to iOS at 2026 PGA Show, bringing advanced golf technology to Apple users globally.
data.description: In 2026, Smart Caddie is set to debut on iOS, introducing cutting-edge golf technology to Apple users globally. The Golfzon Cloud Co., Ltd. revealed in Orlando, Fla., on Jan. 19, 2026, that Smart Caddie—an innovative golf GPS and shot-tracking app—will be made available, promising enhanced user experience for golf enthusiasts.

data.title: Correction by Fisher Architecture on working with Pennsylvania's history. Original release issued on 11-Nov-2025 has been updated.
data.description: In a recent news release dated 11-Nov-2025, Fisher Architecture announced a focus on incorporating Pennsylvania's rich history into design projects rather than working against it. The company emphasized the importance of utilizing time as a design material and embracing the centuries of history in the region. This revised approach aims to enhance the cultural significance of architectural projects in Pennsylvania. This information was provided by Fisher Architecture through PR Newswire.
